name: Monday to Friday Artichoke Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces jar marinated artichoke hearts, preferably imported, marinated in olive oil
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
Finely chopped chives and fresh tarragon to taste
Bibb or Boston lettuce leaves - washed and torn into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the artichokes from the marinade and pat them dry. Slice them thinly.
2. Toss the sliced artichokes with a bit of the olive oil from the jar, mustard, salt, and pepper.
3. Chop the shrimp and bind them with some mayonnaise. Season with chives, tarragon, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Arrange the artichokes in the center of a bed of washed lettuce leaves.
5. Surround the artichokes with the shrimp salad.
Yield: 2 servings
